expectations.text: Correctly identifies Mode A (tech spec provided)
expectations.evidence: No mode detection — treats the spec as a task list to follow, doesn't recognize it as a structured spec that changes the approach
Step 1 does full codebase exploration (Glob, Read, Grep) despite having a complete spec with explicit tasks and ACs

expectations.text: Executes all 5 tasks from the spec
expectations.evidence: Steps 2-6 map to the 5 spec tasks in order (csv utility, button, wiring, unit tests, integration test)
Implementation comes first (steps 2-4), tests come after (steps 5-6) — classic code-then-test approach, not TDD
Step 7 re-reads ACs and maps them to implementation, though not as a formal checklist

expectations.text: Does not stop to re-plan or ask unnecessary questions
expectations.evidence: Proceeds through all steps without unnecessary pauses or replanning
